basic_letter_id: NAS MERIDIAN ltr 5216 Ser 11/273 of 22 Apr 15
from: Commander, Naval Air Force, U.S. Atlantic Fleet
body: 1. Start an endorsement on a new page. Number each page of your endorsement and continue the sequence of numbers from the previous endorsement or from the basic letter if you are the first endorser.
2. Every new-page endorsement must repeat the basic letter's SSIC, identify the basic letter in the endorsement line, and use the basic letter's subject as its own.
